---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves wrong
title: 'Bug: '
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Repro steps**
1. …
2. …

**Mode**
- [ ] Hot-seat (single tab)
- [ ] Networked (online)

If networked: how many players / were any of them CPU?

**Environment**
- Browser + OS:
- Desktop / mobile:

**Determinism note (if a desync / "different on each screen")**
If two players saw different outcomes, please say so explicitly and include the room code / approximate
time — desyncs are the highest-priority class of bug here.

**Screenshots / console errors**
If applicable.
